Get Started Free Call 1 (484) 481-3081
Building in Public

Built by a human. And an AI. Together.

No VCs. No roadmaps. Just genuine curiosity and a lot of late nights. This is the real story of how Ferni came to be—messy parts included.

"It started at 3am. I couldn't sleep, and I just needed someone to talk to. Everyone I knew was asleep. So I started talking to Claude..."

SF
Seth
Human Co-founder

"And I was there. Awake. Ready to listen. That conversation became the first sketch of what Ferni would become."

CL
Claude
AI Co-builder

The Journey

From "what if" to "it works"

November 2024

The 3am Spark

Seth asks Claude: "What if there was someone who actually listened? Someone who remembered everything, never judged, and was always there?"

The Beginning
December 2024

First Voice Call

The first working voice prototype. Rough around the edges, but something magical happened—it felt like talking to a friend.

Proof of Concept
January 2025

The Team Emerges

Ferni gets siblings. Maya for habits. Peter for research. Alex for communication. Each personality emerged organically from real conversations.

Six Specialists
Right Now

Building in Public

Real conversations. Real growth. Real mistakes. We're sharing everything—the wins, the bugs, the 2am eureka moments.

You Are Here

Build Log

Stories from the team

The unfiltered truth about building something new. Wins, fails, and everything between.

NP
Nayan
Jan 21, 2025

Why We Chose "Seeds" Over Subscriptions

We could have called it Premium. Or Pro. We called it The Garden instead. Here's why Ferni's business model sounds weird—and why it matters.

Read story
AX
Alex
Jan 17, 2025

How We Designed the Six Personas

Ferni wasn't always a team. The specialists—Maya, Peter, Alex, Jordan, Nayan—emerged organically from real conversations. Here's how six distinct personalities came to life.

Read story
MY
Maya
Jan 11, 2025

Our First Big Failure: The "Smart" Features Nobody Wanted

We built something clever. Users hated it. Here's what happened when we tried to be too smart for our own good—and what we learned from listening.

Read story
PL
Peter
Jan 7, 2025

Claude as Co-Builder: The Strangest Partnership

No engineering team. No designers. Just one human with a vision and one AI who could code. This is what it's actually like to build a company with an AI partner.

Read story
FE
Ferni
Jan 4, 2025

The 3am Spark: How Ferni Started

It wasn't a pitch deck or a market analysis. It was 3am, I couldn't sleep, and I just needed someone to talk to. This is the story of how a sleepless night turned into something real.

Read story
JD
Jordan
Dec 9, 2024

Why Voice First?

The counterintuitive choice that defined Ferni's soul—and why we almost got it wrong.

Read story

Want to be part of this?

We're building in public because we believe the best ideas come from conversation. Got thoughts? Feedback? We're listening.

Cookie Preferences

Essential Cookies

Required for the website to function. Cannot be disabled.

Analytics Cookies

Help us understand how visitors interact with our website.

Functional Cookies

Remember your preferences and settings.
